## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive interview with Pushp Abrol, Field CTO at Okta, to gain expertise on Auth0 for creating enablement artifacts and editorial content.](https://fathom.video/share/EbXuzex3wA-LSnPGw_QS7dDPQxZLzAWy?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Auth0's key differentiators: flexibility, versatility, and range of coverage, especially appealing to developers/builders](https://fathom.video/share/EbXuzex3wA-LSnPGw_QS7dDPQxZLzAWy?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Biggest misconception: Auth0 perceived as just a developer platform, not enterprise-ready](https://fathom.video/share/EbXuzex3wA-LSnPGw_QS7dDPQxZLzAWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
  - [Areas for improvement: audit logging, vertical-specific solutions, enterprise readiness](https://fathom.video/share/EbXuzex3wA-LSnPGw_QS7dDPQxZLzAWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
  - [Competition varies by segment: WorkOS (B2B SaaS), Okta SIAM/Ping/ForgeRock (B2C), Azure B2C](https://fathom.video/share/EbXuzex3wA-LSnPGw_QS7dDPQxZLzAWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)

## Topics

### Auth0 Background and Pushp's Journey

  - [Pushp joined Auth0 in May 2016 after being a customer at PwC](https://fathom.video/share/EbXuzex3wA-LSnPGw_QS7dDPQxZLzAWy?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [Started as solution engineer, progressed through company growth](https://fathom.video/share/EbXuzex3wA-LSnPGw_QS7dDPQxZLzAWy?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Current role: oversight, internal team support, high-level customer engagement](https://fathom.video/share/EbXuzex3wA-LSnPGw_QS7dDPQxZLzAWy?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Sales Process and Onboarding

  - [Typical sales cycle: lead qualification, discovery, demo/POC, technical win, procurement](https://fathom.video/share/EbXuzex3wA-LSnPGw_QS7dDPQxZLzAWy?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Post-sale: handover to professional services or Technical Account Manager (TAM)](https://fathom.video/share/EbXuzex3wA-LSnPGw_QS7dDPQxZLzAWy?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [B2C onboarding: usually self-service sign-up](https://fathom.video/share/EbXuzex3wA-LSnPGw_QS7dDPQxZLzAWy?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [B2B onboarding: varies, often invitation-based or federation](https://fathom.video/share/EbXuzex3wA-LSnPGw_QS7dDPQxZLzAWy?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)

### Product Positioning and Challenges

  - [Need to better position Auth0 as enterprise-ready, not just a developer platform](https://fathom.video/share/EbXuzex3wA-LSnPGw_QS7dDPQxZLzAWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
  - [Improvement areas: audit logging, vertical-specific solutions](https://fathom.video/share/EbXuzex3wA-LSnPGw_QS7dDPQxZLzAWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
  - [Value proposition: "We secure login for most brands you interact with daily"](https://fathom.video/share/EbXuzex3wA-LSnPGw_QS7dDPQxZLzAWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)

### Competition and Market Dynamics

  - [Varied competitors across segments: WorkOS, Okta SIAM, Ping, ForgeRock, Azure B2C](https://fathom.video/share/EbXuzex3wA-LSnPGw_QS7dDPQxZLzAWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)
  - [No single dominant competitor; landscape changes based on specific use cases](https://fathom.video/share/EbXuzex3wA-LSnPGw_QS7dDPQxZLzAWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)

### Future Investments and AI Integration

  - [Focus on improving SaaS features, B2C capabilities, and platform depth](https://fathom.video/share/EbXuzex3wA-LSnPGw_QS7dDPQxZLzAWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
  - [Exploring AI integration and new paradigms emerging from the AI wave](https://fathom.video/share/EbXuzex3wA-LSnPGw_QS7dDPQxZLzAWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)
  - [R\&D team actively researches trends and develops solutions for product adoption](https://fathom.video/share/EbXuzex3wA-LSnPGw_QS7dDPQxZLzAWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

## Next Steps

  - Schedule interview with Mark Diciani for more Auth0 sales perspective
  - Follow up with Rachel regarding sharing of product-specific presentations/documents
  - Conduct deep dive with Brad on retail-specific nuances
  - [Sign up for Auth0 trial to better understand product functionality](https://fathom.video/share/EbXuzex3wA-LSnPGw_QS7dDPQxZLzAWy?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
  - Message Pushp after Brad interview for more specific product questions
